title: Hermetic Closure World — Runtime Configuration Schema
description: Placeholder schema. No runtime implementation exists yet.

pose_key.description: Named camera pose. Default matches the promoted artifact parameterization.

step_length.description: Integration step size. 0.015 is the parameterization used in the promoted artifact.

max_steps.description: Maximum integration steps per ray. Cliff edge is approximately 300. Budget=700 achieves 100% closure; budget=32 achieves 0%.

adaptive_budget_scaling.description: Allow the integrator to grant additional steps to rays in high-curvature regions. Recovery heatmap shows where this helps.

traversal_mode.description: First-pass traversal mode. 'row' matches the promoted artifact; 'tile' is the production default.

hermetic_closure.description: Per-pixel classification coloring. Required for this world — should default true.

validation_hud.description: Closure %, budget pressure, classification counts. Required for this world.

budget_presets.description: Named budget presets for the visitor toggle. 'failure' and 'success' are the two artifact cells.

warn_on_low_closure.description: Show a prominent warning when closure drops below 50%. Makes the silent failure mode visually explicit.
